content:
## Customer Fit
The Silver Zoom Card is available to applicants who meet both baseline requirements:
- Minimum annual income: 60000.
- Minimum credit tier: good.

Use the card in comparisons when the customer wants a flat rewards structure rather than category-specific acceleration. For side-by-side positioning with adjacent cards, see "Silver Rewards Card Terms" and "Credit Card Product Catalog Overview".

## Rates and Fees
| Term | Silver Zoom Card |
| --- | --- |
| Annual fee | 49 |
| Purchase APR | 23.49 |
| Foreign transaction fee | 2.0 |
| Balance transfer intro period | 18 |
| Rho Bank Plus bonus | 0.0 |

The annual fee applies to the product itself; do not waive it or substitute another card's fee schedule when explaining this card.

## Rewards Profile
The Silver Zoom Card earns 1.0 cashback on everyday purchases, 1.0 on groceries, 1.0 on dining, 1.0 on travel, and 1.0 on sustainable purchases. Crypto purchases earn 0.5 cashback.

When a customer asks whether this card has a premium program uplift, state the Rho Bank Plus bonus exactly as 0.0. See "Credit Card Fee Apr Rewards Matrix" for the broader fee and rewards comparison.
title: Silver Zoom Card Terms
